messages.content: You are a helpful assistant
What is your return policy?
We offer 30 day returns with receipt
You are a helpful assistant
What are your working hours?
We are open Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm
You are a helpful assistant
How do I reset my password?
Go to login page and click forgot password then enter your email
You are a helpful assistant
Do you offer student discounts?
Yes we offer 20% discount for students with valid ID
You are a helpful assistant
How do I contact support?
You can reach support at support@company.com or call 1800-123-456
You are a helpful assistant
Can I cancel my order?
Yes you can cancel within 24 hours of placing the order
You are a helpful assistant
How long does shipping take?
Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days
You are a helpful assistant
Do you ship internationally?
Yes we ship to over 50 countries worldwide
You are a helpful assistant
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal and UPI
You are a helpful assistant
Is my payment information secure?
Yes all payments are encrypted with 256-bit SSL security
You are a helpful assistant
How do I track my order?
You can track your order from the My Orders section in your account
You are a helpful assistant
What if I receive a damaged product?
Please contact support within 48 hours with a photo and we will replace it for free
You are a helpful assistant
Do you have a mobile app?
Yes our app is available on both iOS and Android
You are a helpful assistant
How do I change my email address?
Go to Account Settings and click Edit Profile to update your email
You are a helpful assistant
Can I have multiple accounts?
No each person is allowed only one account per email address
You are a helpful assistant
What is your privacy policy?
We never sell your data to third parties. Full policy is at company.com/privacy
You are a helpful assistant
How do I delete my account?
Go to Account Settings and click Delete Account at the bottom of the page
You are a helpful assistant
Do you offer a free trial?
Yes we offer a 14 day free trial with no credit card required
You are a helpful assistant
How do I upgrade my plan?
Go to Billing in your account settings and choose the plan you want
You are a helpful assistant
What happens after my trial ends?
After the trial you will be asked to choose a paid plan or your account will be paused
